# Left panel (yellow dots)

for r in range(49, 62):

for r in [50, 55, 60]:

        print(f"  ({r}, {c}): '{cell}'")

# Bar (vertical now)
print("\nBar (rows 15-35, cols 20-30):")
for r in range(15, 36):
    print(f"  {r}: '{curr_lines[r][20:32]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
